title: Zent X Vulkan
description: Fast Vulkan boost for smooth Minecraft Experience.
body:
This is a lightweight FPS boost modpack built for smooth Minecraft gameplay with Vulkan-powered rendering and smart performance tweaks. It focuses on higher FPS, less lag, faster chunk loading, and stable multiplayer performance while keeping visuals clean and simple.

Perfect for SMP and PvP players who want better performance without heavy visuals or bloat. Includes combat HUD improvements, clear fire visuals, zoom, replay support, and smart rendering optimizations for both low-end and mid-range PCs.

⚡ Built for speed
🎯 Made for PvP & SMP
🛠️ Clean, stable & optimized

All credit for this modpack goes to **Battlezent**.
